data.text: M02/P05 MOSTLY QUARTZ. LIGHT TAN REFLECTIVITY WITH LIGHT AREAS.
PYRAMIDS IN SECTOR 326.042! ONE AT 48.29 WAS SIGHTED DURING
LANDING, BUT THERE WAS A CLOSER ONE AT -23.21 WHICH LED TO 3
OTHERS AT -33.52, -58.55 AND -40.83. ALSO AT 070.059 A PYRAMID
WAS SIGHTED UPON LANDING , IN A CLEFT IN A HILLSIDE AT 17.-02
ALONG WITH TWO OTHERS AT 11.90 AND 86.-01. ALSO ONE WAS FOUND AT
